revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24598347618|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:阿夫志奈神社]] {{Expand Japanese|阿夫志奈神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Abushina Shrine | native_name = 阿夫志奈神社 | image = Abushina shrine.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Abushina Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.507095|137.080979}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Izanagi|lt=Izanagi|ar|إزاناغي|az|İzanaqi|bcl|Izanagi|bn|ইজানাগি|bs|Izanagi|ca|Izanagi|cs|Izanagi a Izanami|da|Izanagi|el|Ιζανάγκι|en|Izanagi|eo|Izanagi|es|Izanagi|fa|ایزاناگی|fi|Izanaki|fr|Izanagi|he|איזאנגי|hr|Izanagi|hu|Izanagi|id|Izanagi|it|Izanagi|ja|イザナギ|ka|იძანაგი|ko|이자나기|lt|Idzanagis|mk|Изанаги|mni|ꯏꯓꯥꯅꯥꯒꯤ|no|Izanagi|or|ଇଜାନାଗି|pt|Izanagi|ro|Izanagi|ru|Идзанаги|simple|Izanagi|sk|Izanagi|sl|Izanagi|sr|Изанаки|sv|Izanagi|ta|இசநாகி|th|อิซานางิ|tl|Izanagi|tr|İzanagi|uk|Ідзанаґі|vi|Izanagi|zh|伊邪那岐|qid=Q813858|1=Izanagi}} }} {{nihongo|'''Abushina Shrine'''|阿夫志奈神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Mino Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Mino Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Mino Province|ja|美濃国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11609223|1=List of Shikinaisha in Mino Province}} ** Series ordinal: 31 ** P155: {{ill|Tabu Shrine|lt=Tabu Shrine|qid=Q135039906|1=Tabu Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Kanda Shrine|lt=Kanda Shrine|ja|神田神社 (東白川村)|qid=Q11590647|1=Kanda Shrine (Q11590647)}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Kawabe, Gifu|lt=Kawabe|arz|كوابه|ceb|Kawabe-chō|en|Kawabe, Gifu|es|Kawabe (Gifu)|fa|کاوابه، گیفو|fr|Kawabe|it|Kawabe|ja|川辺町|ko|가와베정|ms|Kawabe, Gifu|my|ခါဝဘဲမြို့၊ ဂိဖု|pl|Kawabe (Gifu)|ru|Кавабе|tl|Kawabe, Gifu|tr|Kawabe|uk|Кавабе|uz|Kavabe (Gifu)|zh|川邊町|qid=Q1203748|1=Kawabe, Gifu}} * {{ill|Mino Province|lt=Mino Province|ckb|پارێزگای مینۆ|cs|Mino (provincie)|de|Provinz Mino|en|Mino Province|es|Provincia de Mino|eu|Mino probintzia|fa|ولایت مینو|fr|Province de Mino|gl|Provincia de Mino|hak|Mî-nùng-koet|id|Provinsi Mino|it|Mino (provincia)|ja|美濃国|ko|미노국|lt|Mino žemė|nl|Mino (provincie)|pt|Província de Mino|ru|Мино (провинция)|simple|Mino Province|sk|Mino (provincia)|sr|Провинција Мино|th|แคว้นมิโนะ|tr|Mino (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Міно|vi|Tỉnh Mino|wuu|美濃国|zh_min_nan|Mino-kok|zh_yue|美濃國|zh|美濃國|qid=Q864156|1=Mino Province}} * {{ill|Kamo District, Gifu|lt=Kamo district|ceb|Kamo-gun (distrito sa Hapon, Gifu-ken)|en|Kamo District, Gifu|es|Distrito de Kamo (Gifu)|fr|District de Kamo (Gifu)|id|Distrik Kamo, Gifu|it|Distretto di Kamo (Gifu)|ja|加茂郡|ko|가모군 (기후현)|pl|Powiat Kamo|pt|Distrito de Kamo|th|อำเภอคาโมะ|uk|Повіт Камо (Ґіфу)|vi|Kamo (quận)|zh|加茂郡|qid=Q1348656|1=Kamo District, Gifu}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.507095|137.080979}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == image (P18) == * Abushina shrine.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Izanagi|lt=Izanagi|ar|إزاناغي|az|İzanaqi|bcl|Izanagi|bn|ইজানাগি|bs|Izanagi|ca|Izanagi|cs|Izanagi a ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 1200005006723 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '岐阜県加茂郡川辺町上川辺1190-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:阿夫志奈神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11657364}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine | Name=Abushina Shrine | Image=[[File:Abushina shrine.jpg|250px|Abushina Shrine]]
Haiden (worship hall) | Location={{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|qid=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q1348656|qid=Q1348656|1=Kamo District, Gifu}}{{ill|lt=Kawabe Town|Q1203748|qid=Q1203748|1=Kawabe, Gifu}} Kamikawabe 1190-1 | Coordinates={{WikiCoordinates2DMST|35|30|25.63|N|137|4|51.47|E|scale:25000}} | Enshrined deities={{ill|lt=Izanagi|Q813858|qid=Q813858|lt=Izanagi-no-Ōkami|1=Izanagi}} {{ill|lt=Izanami|Q682306|qid=Q682306|lt=Izanami-no-Ōkami|1=Izanami}} {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} | Shrine rank={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor), former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}, {{ill|lt=Kinpeisha|Q119929592|qid=Q119929592|lt=Ginpeisha|1=Kinpei-sha}} | Founded={{ill|lt=Kōnin|Q1373070|qid=Q1373070|1=Kōnin (era)}} 9 (818) | Honden= | Annual festival=April 14 | Rituals= | Map= {{Location map|Japan Gifu|label=Abushina
Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} '''Abushina Shrine''' (あぶしなじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|lt=Gifu Prefecture|Q131277|qid=Q131277|1=Gifu Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q1348656|qid=Q1348656|1=Kamo District, Gifu}}{{ill|lt=Kawabe Town|Q1203748|qid=Q1203748|1=Kawabe, Gifu}}. It is the Abushina Shrine listed in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} of {{ill|lt=Mino Province|Q864156|qid=Q864156|1=Mino Province}}{{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q1348656|qid=Q1348656|lt=Kamo District|1=Kamo District, Gifu}}. It is located about 200 meters south of {{ill|lt=Kawabe Ōhashi Bridge|Q11479293|qid=Q11479293|1=Kawabe Ōhashi Bridge}}. Every year on April 13–14, the annual festival (Abushina Shrine Festival) is held. On the 13th, during the Shigaraku Festival, one {{ill|lt=festival float|Q11470974|qid=Q11470974|1=Matsuri float}} is pulled. On the 14th, during the Honraku Festival, the Fly-Chasing Man (said to represent {{ill|lt=Sarutahiko|Q3090037|qid=Q3090037|lt=Sarutahiko-no-Mikoto|1=Sarutahiko Ōkami}}) chases children while holding a {{ill|lt=sakaki|Q775470|qid=Q775470|lt=sakaki branch|1=Cleyera japonica}}, and it is said that if he strikes their backs, they will enjoy good health and freedom from illness for that year. === Overview === The shrine is said to have been founded in {{ill|lt=Kōnin|Q1373070|qid=Q1373070|1=Kōnin (era)}} 9 ({{ill|lt=818|Q25083|qid=Q25083|1=818}}). Its original location was about 700 meters north of the current site. After being relocated in {{ill|lt=Jōgan (Japan)|Q1075635|qid=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan|1=Jōgan}} 1 ({{ill|lt=860|Q24714|qid=Q24714|1=860}}), it was moved to its present location in {{ill|lt=Kanpyō|Q1346292|qid=Q1346292|1=Kanpyō (era)}} 9 ({{ill|lt=897|Q30468|qid=Q30468|1=897}}). During the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|qid=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, it was known as “Afukai Myōjin” and “Haga Tennō.” In {{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|qid=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1873|Q7757|qid=Q7757|1=1873}}), it became a {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Izanagi|Q813858|qid=Q813858|lt=Izanagi-no-Ōkami|1=Izanagi}} *{{ill|lt=Izanami|Q682306|qid=Q682306|lt=Izanami-no-Ōkami|1=Izanami}} *{{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} === Subsidiary shrines === *Atago Shrine *Hachiman Shrine *Kotohira Shrine *Shinmei Shrine *Yamagata Shrine *Tōshō Shrine *Inari Shrine *Ōsu Ina Shrine *Otohime Shrine *Wadasumi Shrine *Tōbu Shrine === Cultural properties === *Trees within the grounds of Abushina Shrine (town-designated natural monument){{Cite web|Japanese|date= |url=http://demo-kawabe.wikii.jp/wp-content/uploads/2013/02/町指定文化財一覧.pdf |title=List of Town-Designated Cultural Properties |format=PDF |publisher=Kawabe Town |accessdate=2013-04-20}} 　　　　　　　　 === Transportation === *15-minute walk from {{ill|lt=Takayama Main Line|Q1188357|qid=Q1188357|1=Takayama Main Line}}{{ill|lt=Shimogamo Station|Q5358646|qid=Q5358646|1=Shimoasō Station}} === Notes === {{Footnote help}} {{Reflist}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Abushina Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Abushina Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Abushina Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Mino Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:川辺町の建築物]] [[Category:川辺町の歴史]] [[Category:Ward and municipal designated natural monuments]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]]
